vision_profile.current_state: Vivek is a cyber cafe operator with a B.Sc in Computer Science, solving daily computer problems informally.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest obstacle is the lack of formal recognition and structured learning paths to transition into a professional IT role.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to convert his practical, hands-on problem-solving experience into a recognized IT Helpdesk Technician position.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can confidently handle basic IT requests, provide excellent customer service, and perform initial troubleshooting for common issues.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building a strong foundation, transforming your everyday problem-solving into recognized IT support skills.

modules.title: Introduction to IT Support & Customer Service
lessons: Role of an IT Helpdesk Technician

science.desc: A user reports their printer isn't working after you helped them set it up last week. Diagnose the potential issues and communicate the next steps.

modules.title: Basic Computer Hardware & OS Interaction
lessons: Navigating File Systems and User Profiles

science.desc: A user's new webcam isn't detected by their computer. Walk through the steps to diagnose and resolve the issue, including checking device manager and drivers.

modules.title: Essential Tools & Workflow Basics
lessons: Basic Diagnostic Utilities (Task Manager, Event Viewer)

video.title: Using Task Manager and Event Viewer

science.desc: A user reports their computer is running very slow. Use Task Manager and Event Viewer to identify potential causes and suggest initial remedies.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can effectively manage Windows operating systems, diagnose basic network issues, and apply fundamental cybersecurity hygiene practices.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming the go-to person for Windows and network troubleshooting, building critical technical expertise.

video.title: Using Performance Monitor and Resource Monitor

science.desc: A user's Windows machine is stuck in a boot loop after a recent update. Describe the steps you would take to diagnose and attempt recovery.

modules.title: Network Essentials for Helpdesk
lessons: Basic Network Devices (Routers, Switches, Access Points)

video.title: Setting Up IP Addresses and Subnets

scenario.title: Configuring Static IP for a Device
No Internet Access on a Single PC

science.desc: A user reports they cannot access any network resources, but other devices on the same network are working fine. Troubleshoot the issue using command-line tools.

modules.title: Basic Cybersecurity Hygiene
lessons: Common Types of Malware and Threats
Creating Strong Passwords and Multi-Factor Authentication

scenario.title: Dealing with a Suspected Malware Infection
Advising on Data Backup for a User

science.desc: A user accidentally clicked on a suspicious link and now their browser is redirecting to unknown sites. Guide them through immediate steps to secure their system.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can perform advanced diagnostics on Windows systems, provide remote support efficiently, and automate basic IT tasks using scripting.
milestones.identity_statement: You are mastering the art of deep-dive problem-solving and leveraging tools to work smarter, not just harder.

modules.title: Advanced Windows Diagnostics
lessons: Understanding and Editing the Windows Registry

scenario.title: Diagnosing a Persistent Blue Screen Error
Modifying a Registry Key for Software Fix

science.desc: A critical application fails to launch with an obscure error code. You suspect a corrupted system file or registry entry. Outline your diagnostic approach.

modules.title: Remote Support & Collaboration Tools
lessons: Introduction to Version Control for Documentation (Git concepts)
Building and Managing a Knowledge Base

scenario.title: Troubleshooting a Remote User's Network Issue

video.title: Using Microsoft Teams for IT Support

scenario.title: Coordinating a Complex Issue with Colleagues

video.title: Creating and Maintaining a Knowledge Base

science.desc: A user is working from home and cannot connect to the company VPN. You need to guide them remotely through troubleshooting steps without direct access to their physical machine.

modules.title: Scripting for Automation (Basic)
lessons: Basic File System Operations with Scripts

video.title: Getting Started with Python for IT

scenario.title: Writing a Simple File Cleanup Script

video.title: Advanced Command Prompt and PowerShell Usage

science.desc: You need to quickly gather system information from multiple remote machines. Design a simple script to collect specific data points and save them to a central location.

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can apply ITIL principles to manage incidents and problems, and communicate effectively with users and stakeholders.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into a strategic IT professional, understanding the bigger picture of service delivery and user satisfaction.

modules.title: IT Service Management & Ticketing Workflows
lessons: Problem Management and Root Cause Analysis

scenario.title: Applying ITIL to a Service Outage

science.desc: Explain the difference between an 'incident' and a 'problem' in ITIL, and provide an example of each from a helpdesk perspective.

modules.title: Effective Communication & Documentation
lessons: Principles of Technical Writing for IT

video.title: Writing Clear and Concise IT Guides
Delivering Effective IT Training to End-Users

scenario.title: Training a New Employee on Basic IT Policies

video.title: Mastering Email and Verbal Etiquette in IT

scenario.title: Communicating a System Outage to All Users

science.desc: Describe a situation where you had to explain a complex technical issue to a non-technical user. How did you ensure they understood?

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You understand fundamental cloud computing models and virtualization technologies, enabling you to support modern IT infrastructures.
milestones.identity_statement: You are expanding your horizons beyond traditional IT, embracing the future of cloud and virtualized environments.

modules.title: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
lessons: IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS Service Models
Public, Private, and Hybrid Cloud Deployments
Overview of Major Cloud Providers (AWS, Azure, GCP)

scenario.title: Choosing a Cloud Service Model for a Small Business
Recommending a Cloud Solution for a Web Application

video.title: Key Features of AWS, Azure, and GCP

science.desc: A small company wants to migrate their on-premise file server to the cloud. Explain the benefits and challenges of using a cloud storage solution (e.g., S3, Azure Blob Storage).

scenario.title: Setting Up a Virtual Test Environment

science.desc: A developer needs a consistent environment for their application. Explain how containerization (e.g., Docker) can help achieve this compared to traditional VMs.

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can troubleshoot complex network issues, implement advanced security measures, and contribute to a robust IT security posture.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a guardian of the network and data, securing the digital landscape for your organization.

modules.title: Advanced Network Troubleshooting
lessons: Network Monitoring Tools and Best Practices

video.title: Setting Up and Troubleshooting VPN Connections

scenario.title: Diagnosing a Remote User's VPN Disconnection
Blocking Malicious Traffic with Firewall Rules

science.desc: Users on a specific department's VLAN are reporting slow network speeds and intermittent connectivity to internal servers. Outline your troubleshooting steps.

modules.title: Cybersecurity Best Practices
lessons: Conducting Security Audits and Vulnerability Scans

scenario.title: Granting Secure Access to a Shared Folder

video.title: Encrypting Data at Rest and in Transit

scenario.title: Securing Sensitive Data on a Laptop

video.title: Steps in a Cybersecurity Incident Response Plan

science.desc: Imagine a user reports suspicious activity on their account. Walk through the initial steps you would take as part of an incident response plan.

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You are fully prepared for IT Helpdesk interviews, can articulate your skills effectively, and have a clear vision for your career growth in IT.
milestones.identity_statement: You are ready to launch your formal IT career, equipped with the knowledge and confidence to succeed and grow.

modules.title: IT Helpdesk Interview Prep & Portfolio
lessons: Crafting an Impactful IT Helpdesk Resume

video.title: Tailoring Your Resume for IT Roles

scenario.title: Explaining DNS to a Hiring Manager

science.desc: You are asked to troubleshoot a user's slow computer during an interview. Describe your step-by-step process, including how you would communicate with the user.

modules.title: Specialization Pathways
lessons: Exploring IT Career Paths Beyond Helpdesk
Key Industry Certifications (CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+)
Strategies for Continuous Learning and Skill Development

video.title: Staying Current in the Fast-Paced IT World

science.desc: Where do you see yourself in 3-5 years in your IT career, and what steps do you plan to take to get there?
